scripts.build: bun -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("manifest.json","utf8")); m.name="Grove Local"; fs.writeFileSync("manifest.json", JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+"\n");' && echo 'export const GROVE_ORIGIN = "https://localhost:3000";' > src/lib/origin.ts && bun build src/background.ts src/sidepanel.ts src/content.ts src/euphoria-capture-bridge.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --format=esm --sourcemap && cp src/content.css dist/content.css && cp src/styles.css dist/styles.css
scripts.build:prod: bun -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("manifest.json","utf8")); m.name="Grove"; fs.writeFileSync("manifest.json", JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+"\n");' && echo 'export const GROVE_ORIGIN = "https://www.ongrove.network";' > src/lib/origin.ts && bun build src/background.ts src/sidepanel.ts src/content.ts src/euphoria-capture-bridge.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --format=esm --sourcemap && cp src/content.css dist/content.css && cp src/styles.css dist/styles.css
scripts.package: rm -f grove-extension.zip && mkdir -p _dist && cp manifest.json _dist/ && cp sidepanel.html _dist/ && cp grove-logo*.png _dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r icons _dist/ && cp -r dist _dist/ && cd _dist && zip -r ../grove-extension.zip . && cd .. && rm -rf _dist
scripts.release: bun run build && bun run package
scripts.release:prod: bun run build:prod && bun run package
